title: BSC Academy is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: BSC Academy is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
BSC Academy invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About BSC Academy:
BSC Academy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSC Academy!
